cases.input: Our product manager says we need 99.9% availability. Help us define proper SLIs and SLOs for our customer-facing API.
cases.context: Azure App Service, Application Insights telemetry, 10,000 daily active users, financial services, no existing SLO definitions

cases.input: We've consumed 75% of our monthly error budget in the first two weeks. What governance policy should we apply and how do we respond?
cases.context: SLO target 99.9% over 28 days (40.3 min budget), 30 min already consumed, 3 active feature releases planned this sprint, 5-person engineering team

cases.input: Configure burn-rate alerting for our availability SLO. We want to catch both sudden spikes and slow degradation.
cases.context: Azure Monitor, Application Insights, 99.9% SLO, KQL-based alerts, PagerDuty for on-call, Teams webhook for visibility

cases.input: Design a chaos engineering experiment plan for our AKS-based microservices application. We want to verify our reliability claims in production.
cases.context: AKS with 5 microservices, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Service Bus, Chaos Studio available, production traffic during business hours must not be impacted

cases.input: Our SRE team spends 70% of their time on manual operations: restarting services, rotating certificates manually, and acknowledging false-positive alerts. Help us design a toil reduction strategy.
cases.context: 3 SREs, Azure workload, manual certificate rotation monthly, 50+ alerts per week with 60% false positive rate, no runbooks
